exercises.title: Decision Tree Creation
exercises.description: Create a decision tree for selecting PQC parameters.
hints: Start with security requirements, then consider constraints

exercises.title: Use Case Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze parameter requirements for specific use cases.
hints: Consider data sensitivity and retention period

exercises.title: Migration Strategy
exercises.description: Create a parameter migration strategy for an enterprise.
hints: Start with hybrid, move to PQC-only later

exercises.title: Performance Budget
exercises.description: Calculate performance budgets for different parameter choices.
hints: Include both computation and transmission time
